_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
min_doctor_qualification: Diploma in Orthopedics with 10 years of experience
clinical_indications: Nerve compression injuries such as carpal tunnel syndrome, cubital tunnel syndrome and tarsal tunnel syndrome

preauth.label: Clinical notes with indication for surgery
EMG/NCV/MRI labelled with patient ID, date and side (Left/Right) of affected part

ppd_preauth.q: Clinical notes detailed history, signs & symptoms, planned line of treatment, and indication for procedure?
EMG/NCV/MRI labelled with patient ID, date and side (Left/Right) of affected part confirm the diagnosis?
Were clinical findings and imaging indicative of surgery?

cpd_claim.q: Are the detailed ICPs with daily vitals and treatment details?
Are the detailed procedure / Operative Notes available?
Is the Discharge summary with follow-up advise at the time of discharge?

common_queries: Clinical notes are missing detailed history, signs & symptoms, planned line of treatment, or indication for procedure.
EMG/NCV/MRI report does not confirm the diagnosis or is missing patient ID, date, or side (Left/Right) labels.
Clinical findings and/or imaging are not indicative of surgery for nerve release.
Detailed Indoor Case Papers (ICPs) are missing or lack daily vitals and treatment details.
Detailed Procedure / Operation Notes are not available or incomplete.
Discharge summary is missing or does not include follow-up advice at the time of discharge.

clinical_key_pointers: A nerve release is a surgical procedure used with nerve compression injuries such as carpal tunnel syndrome, cubital tunnel syndrome and tarsal tunnel syndrome.
